particulars.description: Afl house st james road and 14 reading road south fleet hampshire t/no HP410056 and HP396058. By way of fixed charge the benefit of all covenants and rights concerning the property and plant machinery fixtures fittings furniture equipment implements and utensils the goodwill of any business carried on at the property and the proceeds of any insurance affecting the property or assets.
